title: Cloudflare Announces First Quarter 2025 Financial Results
text: First quarter 2025 revenue totaled $479.1 million, representing an increase of 27% year-over-year. GAAP loss from operations was $53.2 million, or 11% of total revenue, and non-GAAP income from operations was $56.0 million, or 12% of revenue. In Q1, Cloudflare landed the largest contract in its history, a more than $100 million deal driven by its Workers developer platform, and signed the longest-term SASE contract to date. Non-GAAP net income per share was $0.18. Cloudflare delivered the highest year-over-year growth in net new ACV in three years. The company demonstrated strong momentum heading into 2025 with significant customer wins and solid revenue growth despite operating losses on a GAAP basis.
